languages.text: {n}Удары и бормотание прекращаются. Мужчина переводит расфокусированный взгляд на вас — в нем читается узнавание.{/n}
{n}The mumbling and head thumping stop. The man shifts his clouded gaze to you, and you see recognition in his eyes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Удары и бормотание прекращаются. Мужчина переводит расфокусированный взгляд на вас — в нем читается узнавание.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The mumbling and head thumping stop. The man shifts his clouded gaze to you, and you see recognition in his eyes.{/n}
{n}The mumbling and head thumping stop. The man shifts his clouded gaze to you, and you see recognition in his eyes.{/n}
{n}The mumbling and head thumping stop. The man shifts his clouded gaze to you, and you see recognition in his eyes.{/n}

languages.text: 彼はうめき声を上げ、頭を叩き始めた。そして、その音が止んだ。彼はぼんやりとした視線をあなたに向け、あなたの顔を見ている。彼の目は、あなたを認識しているようだった。
languages.original_text: {n}The mumbling and head thumping stop. The man shifts his clouded gaze to you, and you see recognition in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 彼はうめき声を上げ、頭を叩き始めた。そして、その音が止んだ。彼はぼんやりとした視線をあなたに向け、あなたの顔を見ている。彼の目は、あなたを認識しているようだった。

languages.text: {n}喃喃自语和撞击声停止了。那男人浑浊的目光转向你，你看到他的眼底恢复了一丝神志。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The mumbling and head thumping stop. The man shifts his clouded gaze to you, and you see recognition in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}喃喃自语和撞击声停止了。那男人浑浊的目光转向你，你看到他的眼底恢复了一丝神志。{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'homme cesse de marmonner et de se taper la tête par terre. Lorsque son regard voilé se pose sur vous, il vous reconnaît immédiatement.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The mumbling and head thumping stop. The man shifts his clouded gaze to you, and you see recognition in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'homme cesse de marmonner et de se taper la tête par terre. Lorsque son regard voilé se pose sur vous, il vous reconnaît immédiatement.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El balbuceo y los cabezazos se detienen. El hombre lleva su mirada vidriosa hacia ti, y ves en sus ojos que te reconoce.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The mumbling and head thumping stop. The man shifts his clouded gaze to you, and you see recognition in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El balbuceo y los cabezazos se detienen. El hombre lleva su mirada vidriosa hacia ti, y ves en sus ojos que te reconoce.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mırıltılar ve kafayı çarpma sesleri duruyor. Adam, puslu bakışlarını sana çeviriyor. Seni tanıdığını fark ediyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The mumbling and head thumping stop. The man shifts his clouded gaze to you, and you see recognition in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mırıltılar ve kafayı çarpma sesleri duruyor. Adam, puslu bakışlarını sana çeviriyor. Seni tanıdığını fark ediyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Mann verstummt und hört auf, seinen Kopf auf den Boden zu schlagen. Als er seinen getrübten Blick auf dich richtet, siehst du Erkenntnis in seinen Augen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The mumbling and head thumping stop. The man shifts his clouded gaze to you, and you see recognition in his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Mann verstummt und hört auf, seinen Kopf auf den Boden zu schlagen. Als er seinen getrübten Blick auf dich richtet, siehst du Erkenntnis in seinen Augen.{/n}
